content: Open Fixture Library documents the needed semantic breadth for fixture authoring: multiple modes, defaults and highlight values, HTP/LTP precedence, typed capabilities and ranges, fine channels, switching channels, matrices/pixel groups/template channels, wheels, and JSON Schema plus programmatic validation. Its internal JSON format may break compatibility, so GOLC should use its own versioned canonical schema and treat OFL as an import/export source rather than the persisted show contract.
